destinations.name: Bangkok
destinations.poeticDescription: Where ancient shrines meet futuristic skyline
customs: Avoid loud voices in sacred areas
destinations.quote: The City of Angels, pulse of modern Thailand.

destinations.name: Chiang Mai
destinations.poeticDescription: Mist-covered peaks where purple blooms meet the sky
destinations.quote: A breath of fresh air above the clouds of Chiang Mai.

destinations.name: Ayutthaya
destinations.poeticDescription: Ruins that whisper Thailand's lost glory
customs: Respect Buddha head in tree roots
destinations.quote: Echoes of a golden age etched in brick and stone.

destinations.name: Kanchanaburi
destinations.poeticDescription: River valleys where history and nature flow as one
destinations.quote: A legacy of resilience amidst verdant jungles.

destinations.name: Nan
destinations.poeticDescription: The ancient salt well cradled by emerald valleys
destinations.quote: Where time slows down to the rhythm of boiling salt.

destinations.name: Mae Hong Son
destinations.poeticDescription: Morning mist dancing over a sea of green tea
customs: Learn the art of tea pouring
activities: Sunrise boat trip on the lake
destinations.quote: A hidden Yunnan gem tucked away in the Thai highlands.

destinations.name: Nakhon Pathom
destinations.poeticDescription: Home of the world's tallest stupa and riverside simplicity
destinations.quote: Where faith rises in golden calm.

destinations.name: Lopburi
destinations.poeticDescription: Ancient ruins watched over by playful monkeys
destinations.quote: Where history meets untamed curiosity.

destinations.name: Ratchaburi
destinations.poeticDescription: Art, mountains, and slow-life riverside charm
destinations.quote: A quiet escape shaped by hills and creativity.

destinations.name: Phetchaburi
destinations.poeticDescription: Palaces, caves, and coastal heritage intertwined
destinations.quote: Elegance carved between mountain and sea.

destinations.name: Prachuap Khiri Khan
destinations.poeticDescription: Where mountains meet the calm Gulf shores
destinations.quote: A gentle coastline of peace and horizon.

destinations.name: Samut Songkhram
destinations.poeticDescription: Where the railway market pulses through local veins
destinations.quote: The rhythm of life on the tracks and tides.

destinations.name: Sangkhlaburi
destinations.poeticDescription: A wooden bridge of friendship spanning the misty lake
destinations.quote: A bridge between cultures, built with faith and wood.

destinations.name: Nakhon Si Thammarat
destinations.poeticDescription: The sacred heart of the South, where pure air meets ancient mountain whispers and golden spires.
dressCode: Polite attire for temple visits (Cover shoulders/knees)
Sandals for exploring the village streams
customs: Observe silent prayer at Wat Phra Mahathat
Support local artisans at the Leather House
Follow the eco-conscious rules of Khiri Wong village
activities: Visiting the Great Noble Relics Pagoda
Watching Nang Thalung shadow puppet crafting
Savoring the purest air in Thailand at Khiri Wong
destinations.quote: A timeless journey through faith and nature's embrace.

destinations.name: Phuket
destinations.poeticDescription: The pearl of the Andaman, where Sino-Portuguese charm dances with neon tides and golden sunsets.
dressCode: Colorful casual wear for Old Town photography
customs: Respect the quiet of the Old Town residents
Keep the beaches pristine and plastic-free
Be mindful of private property when taking photos
activities: Strolling through the Sino-Portuguese Old Town
Catching the legendary sunset at Promthep Cape
Enjoying the vibrant energy of Patong Beach
destinations.quote: An island kaleidoscope of heritage, waves, and wonder.

destinations.name: Krabi
destinations.poeticDescription: The emerald kingdom of towering cliffs and secret lagoons hidden beneath the limestone.
customs: Follow National Park rules for the Emerald Pool
Do not feed the marine life while snorkeling
Minimize noise in secluded natural areas
activities: Swimming in the crystal Emerald Pool
Rock climbing or relaxing at Railay Beach
Boating to the world-famous Phi Phi Islands
destinations.quote: A masterpiece of limestone, turquoise, and infinite tranquility.

destinations.name: Nakhon Ratchasima
destinations.poeticDescription: The gateway to the East, where urban heritage meets the whispering wilds of the mountains.
customs: Pay respects at Ya Mo Monument
Honor the forest spirits at Khao Yai
Support local silk and clay artisans
activities: Strolling through the city night markets
destinations.quote: A grand blend of ancient glory and breathtaking nature.

destinations.name: Ubon Ratchathani
destinations.poeticDescription: The land of the first sunrise, where the mighty Mekong carves stories into the stone.
customs: Leave no trace on the natural rock formations
activities: Witnessing Sam Phan Bok stone carvings
Sunrise at Pha Taem National Park
destinations.quote: Where the sun meets the river in a golden embrace.

destinations.name: Roi Et
destinations.poeticDescription: The city of 101 wonders, home to golden spires that bridge the earth and sky.
dressCode: Polite temple attire (Sleeves and long skirts/pants)
customs: Observe silent prayer in temple halls
Admire the arts without touching the gold leaf
activities: Visiting Phra Maha Chedi Chai Mongkol
Exploring the Roi Et Tower for city views
destinations.quote: A peaceful sanctuary of faith and towering elegance.

destinations.name: Trat
destinations.poeticDescription: The easternmost sanctuary where the sea meets the stars in a dance of pure crystal.
customs: Minimize plastic use on remote beaches
Respect the quiet serenity of local villages
activities: Island hopping to Koh Kood or Koh Chang
destinations.quote: Thailand's last untouched frontier of emerald waves and golden sun.

destinations.name: Chonburi
destinations.poeticDescription: A vibrant coast where high-tech skylines meet timeless wooden masterpieces.
dressCode: Modest attire for temples and shrines
Comfortable footwear for vast garden walks
Safety gear where required by venues
customs: Observe respectful silence in sacred spaces
Avoid touching delicate carvings and plants
Follow all safety guidelines at major attractions
activities: Relaxing at Pattaya or Bang Saen beaches
destinations.quote: A dynamic gateway where heritage and modern adventure collide.

destinations.name: Rayong
destinations.poeticDescription: The radiant coast of golden meadows and shimmering white sand islands.
dressCode: Light clothes for outdoor seafood dining
customs: Dispose of trash properly in National Parks
Respect the marine life while snorkeling
Support local fisherman by trying fresh seafood
activities: Walking through the Golden Meadow (Thung Prong Thong)
Boating to the white sands of Koh Samet
Exploring the ancient Khao Chamao forests
destinations.quote: The shimmering gateway to sea-breeze dreams and golden sun rays.

festivals.name: Songkran Water Festival at Silom
festivals.description: The Thai New Year; a symbolic washing away of misfortunes with water splashing.

festivals.name: Loy Krathong Festival
festivals.description: Releasing lotus-shaped baskets into waterways to honor the water spirits.

festivals.name: Buddhist Monk Ordination
festivals.description: A sacred rite of passage where young men enter the monkhood to merit their family.

festivals.name: Royal Barge Procession
festivals.image: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/7d/พระบรมมหาราชวัง-3.jpg
festivals.description: A majestic river spectacle featuring traditional royal barges and ancient uniforms.

festivals.name: Muay Thai (The Art of Eight Limbs)
festivals.description: Thailand's national martial art and cultural treasure. More than combat, it is a spiritual practice involving the 'Wai Kru' ritual to honor teachers.

festivals.name: Khon Classical Dance
festivals.description: A refined mask dance drama typically based on the Ramakien (the Thai epic). It combines music, vocal literature, and intricate costume design.

festivals.name: The Wai (Traditional Greeting)
festivals.description: The ubiquitous Thai greeting, apology, and expression of respect. It is performed by pressing the palms together in a prayer-like gesture at chest or face level, accompanied by a slight bow of the head.

festivals.name: Tak Bat (Morning Alms Giving)
festivals.description: A serene daily ritual where saffron-robed Buddhist monks walk barefoot through the streets at dawn to collect food offerings from the local community. It is a vital way for Thai Buddhists to make merit.

heritage_arts.title: Benjarong Ceramics
heritage_arts.description: Exquisite hand-painted porcelain traditionally using five primary colors. Once reserved for royalty, it is a masterpiece of Thai craftsmanship.

heritage_arts.title: Indigo Weaving
heritage_arts.description: The art of natural dyeing using the indigo plant, creating the iconic 'Matmi' patterns that tell stories of village life.

architecture.feature: Steep multi-tiered roofs and intricate wood carvings
architecture.description: Reflecting the peaceful nature of the north, focusing on natural teak and elevated structures.
A fusion of Khmer and early Thai influences, seen in the majestic ruins of the old capital.

donts: Stand higher than a seated monk
Use fork to put food in mouth
